subject: FinTech sales cycles are getting longer — here's what the winners do differently
body:
Hi [Name],

Average B2B FinTech sales cycle stretched from 3.2 to 5.1 months between 2022 and 2024. Procurement committees, security reviews, compliance sign-offs — the friction multiplied.

But a subset of companies kept their cycles under 90 days. The pattern: they moved the security and compliance conversation to day one instead of week eight.

[Product] gives your prospects a pre-built compliance package — SOC 2 summaries, data handling docs, procurement questionnaire answers — before they ask.

One VP of Sales cut average cycle from 5 months to 11 weeks. Worth a conversation?
why_it_works: story-based with data — market trend + winner pattern + mechanism + specific result
